testcase.name: search_withStatusFilter_shouldReturnMatchingTransactions
testcase.system-out:
13:20:52.234 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.fintrack.transaction.TransactionServiceIntegrationTest]: TransactionServiceIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:20:52.435 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.fintrack.transaction.TransactionServiceApplication for test class com.fintrack.transaction.TransactionServiceIntegrationTest
